Document:
# Space Stories - Colonial Marines Game Rules
The rules in this section and the in-game manual are primary and take precedence over all other sources such as Discord and Wiki.
## Recent Changes Please refer to the relevant sections for full details. - [textlink="(Rule 1: Griefing)" link="STENGGrief"] Added a ban on shooting for no reason and throwing grenades after the end of a round. - [textlink="(Rule 5: Bug Exploitation and Foul Play)" link="STENGBuggingFoulPlay"] Added more examples of Rule 5 violations. - [textlink="(Standard Operating Procedure)" link="RMCMarineSOPNONModDeployment"] All civilian personnel, except recovered personnel, [bold]require authorization[/bold] from the commander to deploy. - [textlink="(Standard Operating Procedure)" link="RMCMarineSOPNONModDepartment"] Do not award or transfer equipment from vendors that specialize in specific jobs. See full text for details. - [textlink="(Standard Operating Procedure)" link="RMCMarineSOPEquipment"] Light and stun grenades may be carried, but only for the defense of yourself or others. - [textlink="(Survivor Roleplay Standards)" link="RMCSurvivorRoleplay"] Survivors can no longer interact with intelligence targets. See full text for exceptions.
## Admin Decisions are Final - Rules are applied according to their intent. It is impossible to list every example of a rule violation, so enforcement depends on the administrator's interpretation of the rule's meaning. - At their discretion, administrators may address rule violations with in-character consequences. This does not apply to zero-tolerance rules. - You may submit a complaint to Senior Staff if you feel a decision was incorrect.
## General Information Disconnecting or ignoring/refusing admin ahelp will result in a ban appeal-only. This is to prevent malicious players from evading punishment. If you have to leave urgently, inform us and this will be taken into account during your appeal.
All rules listed below are in effect at all times, including between rounds.
## Core Rules These are the core rules of Space Stories - Colonial Marines. Click on them for more detailed information. - [textlink="Rule 0: Community Expectations" link="STENGCommunityExpectations"] - [textlink="Rule 1: Griefing" link="STENGGrief"] - [textlink="Rule 2: Roleplaying" link="STENGRolePlay"] - [textlink="Rule 3: Metagaming and Metacommunication" link="STENGMetagamingMetacommunication"] - [textlink="Rule 4: ERP" link="STENGERP"] - [textlink="Rule 5: Bug Exploitation and Foul Play" link="STENGBuggingFoulPlay"] - [textlink="Rule 6: Ban Evasion and Multi-accounting" link="STENGBypassBlockingMultiAccounts"] - [textlink="Rule 7: Play Your Role" link="STENGPlayYourRole"] - [textlink="Rule 8: Character Names" link="STENGCharacterNames"] - [textlink="Rule 9: Use of Lethal Force" link="STENGUseOfLethalForce"] - [textlink="Rule 10: Military Law and Mutinies" link="STENGMilitaryLawMutinies"]
